title: Senior Financial Analyst - Piramal Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Piramal Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
